HomePage.description: Keep a digital journal of your plant collection. Track history, organize shelves and share with the community in one place.

features.title: Everything your collection needs
features.description: Tools for plant collectors, from the first potting to a public profile.

items.title: Plant collection
items.description: Build a personal library with descriptions, photos and notes for every plant.

items.title: Growth history
items.description: Log repotting, blooming, pest treatment and more in a single timeline.

items.title: Shelves and zones
items.description: Organize plants by spaces like balconies, windowsills or greenhouses.

items.title: Species database
items.description: Link plants to genus and variety records and find the right names quickly.

items.title: Photo album
items.description: Upload multiple photos to each history entry and watch your plants change.

items.title: Public profile
items.description: Share your collection with the community or keep it private with full control.

items.title: Add a plant
items.description: Specify genus, variety, upload photos and describe where the plant lives.

items.title: Keep history
items.description: Record care, observations and events with dates and photos.

items.title: Watch it grow
items.description: See the full life story of each plant and share it with others.

community.title: Inspire other collectors
community.description: Create a public profile and open your collection to the community. Share rare plants, show your shelves and document their progress.
items: A public page with your plants and shelves
Separate visibility controls for each section
A profile link you can share anywhere

cta.title: Start documenting your collection today
cta.description: Free. No limits. Your plants deserve attention and care.

verification.title: Check your email
verification.description: We sent a verification email to <email></email>. Follow the link in the email to activate your account.
verification.hint: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder or

errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters long
